creator: gavin@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

To submitter: Can you please give us the text of the panic itself? 
Especially important is the line that starts "panic: blockable sleep 
lock", but if you can copy down the whole lot (or provide a link to a 
good digital photo) that would be fine.  Without this, there isn't 
enough info to begin to diagnose the problem
